title: T-123 — Playwright harness scaffolded under apps/web/e2e/ + production-grade playwright.config.ts (P0)
prompt:
# T-123 — Playwright harness scaffolded under apps/web/e2e/

PRD: docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md §5 Testing ("Vitest v4 + Playwright v1.58 (E2E per module)"); UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md (Playwright traces in closeout)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Replace the 12-line stub `playwright.config.ts` (auditor B §4.8) with a production-grade Playwright harness — proper `playwright.config.ts`, the `apps/web/e2e/` directory with a smoke spec, fixtures, projects (chromium + webkit + iPad scanner-emulation), trace + video + screenshot on failure, and a `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e` script that runs the suite and produces traces. UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY mandates Playwright traces in closeout; today no module can satisfy it.

## Implementation contract
1. Rewrite root `playwright.config.ts`:
   - `testDir: './apps/web/e2e'` (canonical) — keep secondary glob for legacy `apps/web/tests/**` only if files exist.
   - `fullyParallel: true`, `retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0`, `workers: process.env.CI ? 2 : undefined`.
   - `reporter: process.env.CI ? [['html', { open: 'never' }], ['github']] : 'list'`.
   - `use: { baseURL, trace: 'retain-on-failure', screenshot: 'only-on-failure', video: 'retain-on-failure', viewport: { width: 1280, height: 800 } }`.
   - Projects: `chromium` (desktop), `webkit` (Safari), `mobile-chrome` (Pixel 5), `scanner-emulation` (custom viewport 800x480, Zebra TC53 user-agent stub).
   - `webServer`: when `PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1` → `command: 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web build && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web start'`, `url: baseURL`, `reuseExistingServer: !CI`, `timeout: 180_000`.
2. Create `apps/web/e2e/fixtures.ts` exporting a `test` extended with org-context fixtures (a logged-in `org_admin` for one test org, plus a `scanner_operator` profile). Login via Server Action stub or seeded session cookie.
3. Create `apps/web/e2e/smoke.spec.ts` — a single smoke test that:
   - Navigates to `/onboarding/profile` (the SET-001 prototype-parity page).
   - Asserts the page title contains "Onboarding".
   - Asserts the Stepper primitive renders.
   - Captures a trace + screenshot artifact.
   - Bonus: asserts no `pa11y`/`axe` violations (using `@axe-core/playwright`).
4. Modify `apps/web/package.json` adding scripts:
   - `e2e`: `playwright test`.
   - `e2e:install`: `playwright install --with-deps chromium webkit`.
   - `e2e:ui`: `playwright test --ui` (local dev).
5. Modify `pnpm-workspace.yaml` if needed (no change expected since `apps/web` is already a workspace member).
6. Modify `.gitignore` to add `playwright-report/`, `test-results/`.
7. Verify the existing `apps/web/e2e/auth.spec.ts` still runs after harness rewrite — or migrate it to use the new fixtures.

## Files in scope
- playwright.config.ts [modify — full rewrite]
- apps/web/e2e/fixtures.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/smoke.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/auth.spec.ts [modify if needed to use new fixtures]
- apps/web/package.json [modify — add e2e scripts]
- .gitignore [modify — playwright-report/, test-results/]
- packages/ui/test/axe-helper.ts [create if not present — re-export @axe-core/playwright helper]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e run against built Next.js, when smoke.spec.ts executes, then it passes and trace + screenshot artifact lands under test-results/.
2. Given playwright.config.ts loaded, when projects listed, then contains exactly 4 projects: chromium, webkit, mobile-chrome, scanner-emulation with viewport 800x480.
3. Given smoke test runs in CI with PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1, when it exits, then playwright-report/ produced and test-results/ uploaded as CI artifact (T-122 handles upload).
4. Given @axe-core/playwright invoked in smoke.spec.ts, when page scanned, then 0 violations of severity 'serious' or higher reported; AND Given existing apps/web/e2e/auth.spec.ts present, when new harness runs, then it still executes without breakage from rewrite.
## Test strategy
- RED: write `playwright.config.test.ts` (vitest) asserting the config structure (projects array, baseURL, reporter shape) before rewriting the config. RED: `pnpm vitest run playwright.config.test.ts`.
- GREEN: rewrite config, create fixtures + smoke spec, update scripts.
- Run: `pnpm vitest run playwright.config.test.ts && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e:install && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web build && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not run E2E against a dev server with hot-reload — always build + start for stability.
- Do not commit `playwright-report/` or `test-results/` — gitignore.
- Do not skip the `@axe-core/playwright` check — UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY requires a11y in closeout.
- Do not delete the existing `auth.spec.ts` — migrate to fixtures or leave as-is.
- Do not hardcode test-user credentials — use env or test-seeded session cookies via fixture.
- Do not run Playwright in parallel with Vitest in CI on the same DB — separate jobs in T-122.

pipeline_inputs.description: Replace 12-line stub playwright.config.ts with production-grade harness (4 projects: chromium/webkit/mobile-chrome/scanner-emulation), apps/web/e2e/fixtures.ts (org_admin + scanner_operator fixtures), apps/web/e2e/smoke.spec.ts with @axe-core/playwright + trace artifact, e2e scripts in package.json, gitignore updates.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Config testDir=apps/web/e2e canonical. retries=2 in CI, retain-on-failure trace/screenshot/video. webServer builds + starts Next.js in CI. Smoke test asserts /onboarding/profile stepper + 0 axe violations. fixtures provide pre-authenticated org_admin + scanner_operator sessions via seed cookie. Existing auth.spec.ts must continue running.

AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).
out_of_scope: Full per-module E2E suites (each module owns its own e2e/)
acceptance_criteria: Given pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e run against built Next.js, when smoke.spec.ts executes, then it passes and trace + screenshot artifact lands under test-results/.
Given playwright.config.ts loaded, when projects listed, then contains exactly 4 projects: chromium, webkit, mobile-chrome, scanner-emulation with viewport 800x480.
Given smoke test runs in CI with PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1, when it exits, then playwright-report/ produced and test-results/ uploaded as CI artifact (T-122 handles upload).

Given @axe-core/playwright invoked in smoke.spec.ts, when page scanned, then 0 violations of severity 'serious' or higher reported; AND Given existing apps/web/e2e/auth.spec.ts present, when new harness runs, then it still executes without breakage from rewrite.
test_strategy: RED: write playwright.config.test.ts (vitest) asserting config structure (projects array, baseURL, reporter shape) before rewriting; RED: pnpm vitest run playwright.config.test.ts.
GREEN: rewrite config + create fixtures + smoke spec + update scripts + gitignore.
Run: pnpm vitest run playwright.config.test.ts && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e:install && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web build && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e.
risk_red_lines: Do not run E2E against dev server with hot-reload — always build + start.
Do not commit playwright-report/ or test-results/ — gitignore.
Do not skip @axe-core/playwright check — UI parity policy.
Do not delete existing auth.spec.ts — migrate or leave.
Do not hardcode test-user credentials — env or fixture-seeded cookies.
Do not run Playwright in parallel with Vitest on same DB in CI — separate jobs.
